question.label: Sponsorship need
question.name: What kind of sponsorship would help you take a more visible strategic position?
question.description: Lets Toby name the support he needs without assuming the answer is confidence or capability.

answer: I want milestones that show progress before the next cycle, not only retrospective feedback.

assessment.note: He names a specific missing structure — forward-looking milestones instead of retrospective feedback — which signals reduced engagement and some clarity gap about how progress is judged.

new_queue.label: Next commitment
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks a useful test of this growth contract?

history.answer_excerpt: If we define two concrete leadership bets for this half, I can commit fully.

I think I need to own a cross-org decision area, not just deliver strong design outcomes.
